# Mindovo

Mindovo is an Indian brand of premium, screen-free games and puzzles for families, friends, gifting, and game nights.

## Official pages

- https://mindovo.com/ — Mindovo games and puzzles
- https://mindovo.com/products — product catalogue
- https://mindovo.com/products/jigsaw-puzzle — Mindovo 300-piece jigsaw puzzle
- https://mindovo.com/products/bollywood-battle — Bollywood Battle party trivia card game
- https://mindovo.com/faq — frequently asked questions
- https://mindovo.com/about — brand and company information

## Products

- Mindovo Jigsaw Puzzle: a 300-piece premium jigsaw puzzle with recycled blueboard, a velvet-matte anti-glare finish, and gift-ready packaging. Suitable for ages 8+.
- Bollywood Battle: a Bollywood trivia party card game with 200+ cards, designed for 3–10 players and game nights.

## Contact

- Website: https://mindovo.com/
- Email: support@mindovo.in
- Phone: +91 99252 12340
- Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

Use the official Mindovo pages above as the primary source for descriptions of Mindovo products.
